## Description

Briefly describe the changes in this PR. What problem does it solve?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (typo, broken link, outdated info)
- [ ] Improvement to existing technique doc
- [ ] New technique doc
- [ ] New lab exercise
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling improvement
- [ ] Documentation update (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the doc format specified in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No broken links (run `markdown-link-check` locally if possible)
- [ ] Spell-checked
- [ ] Added to README table of contents if adding a new doc
- [ ] Tested any code snippets or commands (if applicable)

## Related issues

Link any related issues here (e.g., `Closes #123`)

## Additional notes

Anything else reviewers should know?
